programme.title: Partner
programme.desc: In the romantic comedy film "Partner", we meet Prem, a self-proclaimed love guru who assists people in finding their soulmates. Despite his expertise, Prem's own love life is in disarray until he befriends Bhaskar, a carefree and fun-loving man. The two become business partners and friends, and Prem coaches Bhaskar on the intricacies of romance to help him win over Naina. However, their journey is filled with hilarious hurdles and misunderstandings that test their friendship and love lives.

programme.title: Ek Thi Daayan
programme.desc: A supernatural thriller that tells the story of a magician haunted by a childhood memory of encountering a witch. When he falls in love with a woman who resembles the witch, he must confront his fears and uncover the truth about her identity. The film explores themes of superstition, fear, and the power of the mind in a spine-tingling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire. In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.” The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.

programme.title: SM Clear & Sparkling Playlist
programme.desc: A collection of music videos with SM's signature refreshing and cool vibe.

programme.title: Getting Stronger Mode
programme.desc: A playlist packed with fierce energy and unstoppable beats — perfect for when you need to feel invincible and ready to take on anything.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The title track “Promise” is an impressive ballad that begins with a minimal piano melody and gradually builds emotional depth as strings are added in the latter half. The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. Even if the confession comes late, it delivers a sincerity and emotional resonance stronger than any other words.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement. With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: EXO has returned with a new trailer. At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.” “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV

The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire. In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Younha! Younha began her career in 2003 in Japan with her first single “ゆびきり.” Then she found mainstream success the following year with her second Japanese single “ほうき星 (Comet)” which was included on the soundtrack of the anime series “Bleach.” The song peaked on the Oricon Chart at #15 giving her the nickname of the “Oricon Comet.” Her success in the island country led to her debut in Korea as well she debuted in Korea in 2016 where she is regarded as one of the country's best singer-songwriters. From “Waiting” to “Password 486” Younha has many hit songs under her belt. She has also collaborated with numerous A-list musicians including Toy and Epik High. In November last year Younha released her sixth full-length album “END THEORY” to once again prove how versatile of a musician she is. From rock to ballad music she covered various genres in the album and the album's lead single “Stardust” was chosen as one of Billboard's Best K-pop Songs of the Year. In this episode Younha performs “Stardust” “Wish” “Waiting” “How U doing” and more to nourish our hearts. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Kuonechan is a rising star in Korean R&B circles known for his sweet voice and heartwarming music. After debuting in the music scene with the EP “Repetition” in September 2017 he diligently pursued his career releasing a total of three EPs within a year. He's now actively collaborating with big names in the industry including Baek Yerin Jang Sukhoon Humbert and Fisherman and making his distinctive mark in the industry. This artist recently finished his mandatory military duties and announced a new chapter in his career. In this episode Kuonechan performs his new single “Expression” as well as “Don't be sad” “How Did You” and more to nourish our souls. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented musician!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer ALi! ALi burst into the music scene in 2005 as a guest vocalist for Leessang. Thanks to her unique voice and expressive vocals she mesmerized the public immediately and then she made her debut as a solo artist in 2009 with the album “After The Love Has Gone.” In the competition program “Immortal Songs” she presented her own covers of various masterpieces including “Leopard of Kilimanjaro” and “I Have a Girlfriend” and gained both popular and critical acclaim. In December last year ALi released the remake album “Adolescence” which is composed of the five songs that had a huge influence on her back in her 20's and 30's to share with listeners how she makes the most of the youngest day of her life. In this episode ALi performs “For lovers who hesitate” “Break away” and “Please wait for me” from her latest album as well as “Eraser” and “The way the light.” Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this.

programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.desc: Lee Yeo Reum is a young woman whose career and life are going very well: She has just been awarded permanent contract status at work, and she has a boyfriend she likes very much. But work is starting to get stressful, and then she is hit with a double whammy of misfortune.

programme.desc: On the day of Yuil Constuction's charity concert, the daughter of Seo-jin, the company's youngest director, goes missing. Seo-jin tries to find his daughter, but even the police aren't making much progress.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When children are young, parents care for them and give them all they need to live a good life. The circle of life, however, means that one day, it is the children's turn to care for their parents and give them a happy retired life. In the current moral fabric of society, rarely and not often it works out that way. It didn't happen that way with Savita too, as her children had no time to look after her. So she decided not to settle out and reinvent her life. She embarks on a journey to discover herself and to make her own identity as an individual. Janani tells an inspirational story of a mother who rose against all odds and became successful.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Argo' s World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate

programme.title: Ebb and Flo

Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, we'll dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdatta Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Wild Menu

programme.title: Wild Connection
programme.desc: With the geological closure of the Isthmus of Panama 4 million years ago, the two largest oceans of the planet were separated.

programme.title: Natural Genius
programme.desc: No other technology allows a better dispersion and colonization of new ecosystems than the control of temperature and humidity. Both in cold areas where it is necessary to find ways of protection from low temperatures, and in scorching areas where it is essential to defend oneself from solar radiation and to avoid loss of humidity.

programme.title: Water Life
programme.desc: Many creatures thoroughly enjoy life on the world's cliffs the sea shapes the cliffs and creates a landscape whose nooks and crannies serve as refuge, but competition for space often turns ferocious.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: MOTHER NATURE UNPREDICTABLE, POWERFUL AND MESMERIZING. ANYTHING CAN CHANGE IN A SPLIT SECOND. FROM HEAVY RAIN, TO HAIL THE SIZE OF BASEBALLS, GIANT TORNADOS, AND WILDFIRES ENCAPSULATING THOUSANDS OF ACRES OF LAND, THIS IS JUST ANOTHER DAY HERE ON EXTREME WEATHER COUNTDOWN.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: You better board up the windows and secure all the doors, because Mother Nature is back and ready to show you just how powerful she can be, with some of the most electrifying, fiercest, and extreme weather videos you have ever seen!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Today's forecast is quite the doozy! Wind, followed by hail, and then with a bit of a hurricane for good measure. No, it's not the end of the world...it's just another day here on Extreme Weather Countdown! j

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Rain. Snow. Lightning. Hurricanes. Dust devils. When these weather phenomena combine, it's usually a recipe for disaster. But on this show, it's just another normal day in the books. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Get ready, because it's time once again to watch some of the wildest weather videos you've ever seen! From thunderstorms to tornadoes, hail to flooding, we've got it all

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Do you ever wish you could see all the wackiest weather from around the world, without moving a muscle or lifting a finger? Your wish is our command here on a brand new episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Where can you float through a flood, battle a blizzard, and twist around in a tornado, all in the same day? Nowhere but here, on Extreme Weather Countdown. Buckle up, because we've got a wild ride in store for you today.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Today's countdown will give you a front row seat to some once in a lifetime weather phenomena from around the globe, so let's batten down the hatches and get right into it!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Welcome to a brand new episode of Extreme Weather Countdown. I hope you've got your snow boots, umbrellas, winter coats, and perhaps a bathing suit to change into because today we will be running the gamut of inclement weather events from all over the globe.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: You've arrived at the only place flash floods, thunderstorms, avalances, and gale force winds will flash before your eyes one after the other. That's right, you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown, and we have an all-new lineup prepared today.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Here at Extreme Weather Countdown, no natural phenomenon is too crazy, and we've returned with an episode chock-full of footage from the eye of the storm. Settle in, because there are rough seas ahead.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: There's only one place where you could watch a lightning storm chases an avalanche into a flood, and it's right here on Extreme Weather Countdown. We have a brand new lineup that is bursting at the seams with some of the craziest climate events caught on camera.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George tracks a building storm that threatens that tough mid-western city, chases a hail storm, fights to get in the middle of a vicious dust-devil and the funky roadside Americana of the American Midwest

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host/adventurer George Kourounis ups the danger factor by traveling with wild atheist shock-jock R.J. Evans to track massive lightning storms which can produce bolts of up to one hundred million volts.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.desc: Actress Hedy Lamarr, “the world's most beautiful woman,” had a knack for inventing. During WWII, in an effort to help the Allies, she devised a technology designed to intercept Axis communications – and created the foundation of wireless internet.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.desc: The early days of online video were plagued by low resolution and unbearable buffering times. But one day that all changed. In the late 90s, a breakthrough technology revolutionized streaming video, setting the foundation for the era of Netflix.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.desc: Dwight Eisenhower's interstate highway system was the biggest infrastructure project of its time, a bold plan to connect all corners of America and boost the economy. So how did it end up deepening the divide between rich and poor?

programme.title: Top 10: The Art of Architecture
programme.sub-title: Theatres and Opera Houses: Unforgettable Experiences
programme.desc: Theaters and opera houses are wonders of stage technology, as well as exquisite masterpieces of modern or historic architecture.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: A Rugged Case, a Precision Aerial Delivery System, a Military Survival Shelter, and an Armoured Personnel Carrier
programme.desc: Polyethylene is measured and molded, heated and cooled to create a rugged and air-droppable case that's tougher than the rest. Stronger, lighter, and more durable than their wooden predecessors, these keep out wind, rain, sand, and humidity to ensure that valuable supplies arrive intact.

programme.title: Battle Factory
programme.sub-title: Swiss Army Knife, a Sub-Machine Gun, Body Armour, and a Laser Sight
programme.desc: An iconic knife that's been an integral part of military culture for more than a hundred years, the Swiss Army Knife has been put in service around the world – and even in space.

programme.title: VR 101
programme.desc: From physical examination, and surgery to Psychotherapy and Autism treatment. Even Traditional Chinese medicine can be practiced on VR.

programme.title: VR 101
programme.desc: In this episode, we make some virtual friends, have some virtual meetings, do some virtual research.

programme.title: Secrets of the Factories
programme.desc: From making fresh spaghetti and mixing the top-secret ingredients for sauce, to giant automated cranes and the latest robots, join today's Heinz factory workers alongside tomorrow's machines, making cans of household favourites.

programme.title: Vet Tales
programme.desc: Willow's leg is lame and Stacey decides to amputate, Jack the Jack Russel has been kicked out of doggy school and Stacey tries to help and Mark changes Shadow the cat from a male into a female.

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: All great apes are highly endangered partly due to hunting and illegal pet trade, but mainly due to shrinking habitats. Sitting in the tree tops and jungles is a reminder of our past and our responsibilities for the future.

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: Commonly feared, spiders nevertheless persist in every part of the world in great numbers. Spiders are among the biggest groups of invertebrates with over 43,000 species.

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: Over a hundred people are killed every year by enraged elephants in India alone… with an additional 400 worldwide, though often seen as a symbol for calmness, patience and exotic nobility these true giants of the wild will need protection in the years to come.

programme.title: Wild About
programme.desc: Once highly endangered but now flourishing thanks to a concentrated effort to preserve their natural habitat, these ancient creatures continue to stalk waters as one of the last remaining predators on earth.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Our closest relatives, primates are a diverse group of highly intelligent mammals. Over 440 species, with varied social structures and behaviours, explore chimpanzee's, gorillas, orangutan and more.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: From the deserts to the densest jungles, one group of mammals can be found unlike all the rest. A few predatory but many carnivorous, marsupials include the red kangaroo to the tiny mouse.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Rodents exist everywhere on earth making up over 40% of all mammal species. This episode takes a look at the muroid family of rodents as well as beavers and squirrels.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: A diverse group of distantly related families and species sharing a few common traits, marine invertebrates include polyps, octopus and jellyfish.

programme.title: Monkey Thieves
programme.desc: Zamir and his new troop raid a jewelry store and break into a hotel store room leading to a run-in with little Kavi, who becomes the troop's latest recruit.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: In Echo's family, her niece Elettra is a mother for the first time. She has a lot to learn. Three-day-old baby Evaline finds the going tough, as her mother fails to watch over her, and the others send the adventurous youngster packing.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.sub-title: Triumph and Disaster War at the waterhole
programme.desc: For Echo and her family, the weeks after the rains are good times. They have time to take a mud bath together. Baby Evaline is a handful, and new mother Elettra still hasn't learnt to stay close to her.

programme.desc: Dive in and meet these majestic creatures face-to-face. First up is the most notorious shark in nature the ultimate predator: The Great White.

programme.title: Safari Flix

programme.title: Snake Master

programme.title: Salamander Scavenger Hunt! – How Many Will We Find?!
programme.desc: Coyote leads a scavenger hunt to find as many salamanders as possible. With every flip of a log, a new amphibian awaits.Can a frog be poisonous *and* delicious? Coyote tries a legal and safe sample of a species known for its toxins and explains how toxicity works in the wild.

programme.title: Giant Frog Kissed! – Prince or Princess?
programme.desc: In a fairytale-worthy twist, Coyote kisses a giant frog in the name of science and fun. Does it turn into royalty? You'll have to see.A sobering episode recounts a fatal snake bite case. Coyote shares what went wrong and what to do in the event of a venomous encounter.

programme.title: Prehistoric Creature Found Alive! (Trilobite Beetle)
programme.desc: It looks like something from another era—and it is! Mark discovers a trilobite beetle, a living relic that predates the dinosaurs.This giant black bee is more than just big—it's aggressive. Mark takes the sting and shows why it's one of the most feared pollinators.

programme.title: Stung by Meanest Scorpion in Thailand!
programme.desc: Watch as Mark takes on the first recorded sting from the dangerous Thai Bark Scorpion! Where will it land on the Brave Wilderness Bite-Sting Index? How will the sting compare to the likes of the Bullet Ant, Fire Worm, and the deadly Arizona Bark Scorpion? We're about to find out!

programme.title: Catching a Rare Crocodile Gar!
programme.desc: Catching a crocodile gar is no easy task. Coyote wrestles this rare fish and reveals its incredible adaptations and prehistoric looks.Texas is home to weird wildlife—and weird stories. Coyote explores some of the Lone Star State's strangest animal encounters and local lore.

programme.title: Stung by a Tarantula Hawk Countless Times! – Glinda Approved
programme.desc: The brown recluse spider has a terrifying reputation. Coyote carefully handles one and explains what's myth, what's fact, and what to fear. Coyote puts his head in a box full of live spiders. The volcano ant is here—and it bites hard! Coyote counts down 10 facts about this intense species.

programme.title: Diving with a Jetpack!
programme.desc: This emotional episode follows chimpanzees rescued from testing labs as they adapt to new lives of freedom and care.Coyote tests an underwater jetpack, soaring through the ocean and meeting sea life in this high-speed dive adventure you have to see to believe!

programme.title: Bullet Ant Box – Will I Get Stung?!
programme.desc: Back in the bullet ant box! Coyote endures more stings to test endurance, pain, and his own mental limits in this returning challenge.Being a snake milker is one of the world's most dangerous jobs. Coyote counts down the top 10 most intense moments in venom extraction.

programme.title: SAVED! Prehistoric Bird Escapes Extinction!
programme.desc: Discover how a prehistoric bird species was brought back from the brink of extinction. Coyote explains the science, challenges, and incredible success story of survival.

programme.title: Inked by a Tattoo Needle!
programme.desc: Coyote faces manys fear... Getting a tatoo!Caring for a miniature pony is no small job! Coyote visits a farm and learns the basics of grooming, feeding, and why these tiny horses need special care.

programme.title: 100,000 Endangered Bats vs. Deadly Fungus!
programme.desc: A deadly fungus threatens over 100,000 endangered bats. Coyote investigates the science, symptoms, and species affected by white-nose syndrome.

programme.title: Stung by the Longest Stinger! (Cow Killer Ant)
programme.desc: The cow killer ant lives up to its name with a stinger that's long, venomous, and brutal. Mark takes it on in a painful sting challenge.The desert scorpion's sting may be quick, but the pain lingers. Mark walks viewers through the anatomy and danger of this desert dweller.

programme.title: Baby Komodo Encounter – Are They Dangerous?!
programme.desc: Baby Komodo dragons may be small, but they pack serious attitude. Coyote gets up close to answer the question: are they dangerous?A wobbegong shark hiding in a tide pool? Mark finds this camouflaged predator and explains its hunting style and unique appearance.

programme.title: Stung by the Gympie Gympie! (World's Most Painful Plant Sting)
programme.desc: Coyote braves the Gympie Gympie, Australia's infamous pain plant. The sting leaves lasting effects and is known to bring grown men to tears.With nothing but his bare hands, Coyote tries catfish noodling—reaching into muddy water for a hidden monster. It's wild, messy, and risky.

programme.title: Spencer's Holiday BBQ
programme.desc: Join charismatic chef Spencer Watts at his glorious rooftop patio for a one-hour special featuring a full holiday spread, all made on the BBQ. Spencer's festive menu is all about creative BBQ twists with his delectable, mouth-watering recipes including Burnt Orange Cranberry Marmalade, Maple Rye Pumpkin Pie, and Asparagus with Smoked Salmon Dip. Save room for the piece de Q-sistance: Smoked Turkey Two Ways. This year, take your holiday feast outside and serve up something deliciously different.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is right around the corner and it calls for a little fun - like a twist on traditional holiday desserts! FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: TWISTS ON THE CLASSICS offers a new take on some of your favourites to bring you a fresh perspective and world of flavour for the holidays! Enchanting host Jessica McGovern plays off classic desserts, serving up handy hints on how to get the most out of every bite. From sweet and fluffy Gumdrop Cakes drizzled with a light lemony glaze to a delectable Eggnog Ski Slope Cake decorated with rosemary trees and a few friends to hit the hills, Jessica's unique holiday recipes will surly make it on your list of Christmas traditions!

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: Gusto TV's Wizard of Whatever, Chef Kyle Crawford, is dishing up a holiday feast! There'll be food, fun, elves… and even jolly old St. Nick himself may make an appearance! Join in as Kyle cooks up a Christmas goose complete with stuffing and gravy, plus all the sides and salads, and even a flashy flambé dessert! Merry whatever!

programme.title: Michael Bonacini's Christmas at the Farm
programme.desc: In this heartwarming holiday special, Chef Michael Bonacini invites us to his cozy farmhouse in Ontario for a charming Christmas feast. In this scenic winter retreat, Bonacini interprets classic Welsh and Italian Christmas dishes from his childhood. Michael cooks up comforting dishes from hearty potato leek soup, to succulent roast lamb, to classic molten chocolate lava cake. As he explores homey Christmas flavours, Michael shares his traditions and gives tips for perfecting the holiday meal.

programme.title: Watts Up for the Holidays
programme.desc: Spencer Watts serves up his take on traditional holiday fare, showing us that you can make an impressive dinner without the stress. In this cheerful one-hour special, charming bachelor Spencer takes you through all the planning tips and lets you in on his secrets to create the ultimate holiday meal.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration.

programme.title: One World Kitchen: Our Favourite Holiday Recipes
programme.desc: In this special holiday episode of One World Kitchen, Hana (Japan), Vanessa (Italy), Natalia (Argentina), and Pailin (Thailand) get together to cook their favorite traditional holiday dishes influenced by their respective cultures. Christmas Sushi Rolls, Veal in a Creamy Tuna Sauce with Capers, Striped Bass in Garlic and Lime Marinade, and an epic Timballo. For the final recipe, our hosts combine all the flavors of One World Kitchen into a truly internationally-inspired turkey dish. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes. Michael invites us to the set of his series "Bonacini's Italy" to cook up traditional Italian fare like Salt Cod Mousse on Polenta Crostini and Pork Braised in Milk. Michael takes us on a holiday culinary journey as he explores homey Christmas flavours and traditions, offering tips for perfecting dishes from the regions of Veneto, Sardinia, Calabria, Sicily, and Emilia Romagna.

From the coastal vibes at Vida Agave to island-famous eats at The Spot, savory classics at Mario's Seawall, local favorites at Mosquito Cafe, and indulgent sweets from Pattycakes Bakery, they turn up the heat to craft a cheat meal packed with bold flavors and Galveston flair.

programme.title: Amplify: USVI
programme.desc: Host Naydyeyah Acoy-Thomas traces the rich, layered history of St. Croix's musical roots, uncovering the deep ties to African, European, and indigenous Taíno traditions. Featuring voices like Asta Williams, Willard John, Rashidi Clenance, and Vio International, the episode explores how genres such as quelbe, calypso, and scratch band music were born from the island's complex past. Through storytelling, performances, and cultural insight, Naydyeyah reveals how the rhythms of resilience and celebration continue to echo through generations.
